column1: #Text=Let Me Play Among the Stars (in other words, hold my hand)
#Text=Ever since 134340-Pluto and 136199-Eris were reclassified as planets, Jeon Jeongguk's life has been utter hell.
#Text=He's been stuck on an ancient hunk of metal on the edge of the Kuiper Belt for the past
#Text=on account of public demand for the two largest dwarf planets (well, now ex-dwarf planets) to regain planetary status.
#Text=The literal definition of a planet, which hadn't changed since 2006, was rewritten and two new additions were welcomed into the local solar system.
#Text=Which is nice and all, except for the part where Jeongguk was put on goddamn Eris Duty.
#Text=For the first month or so he managed to convince himself that he wasn't bored out of his mind by reasoning that
#Text=at least it's better than Earth, you can't even see that planet through all the atmospheric smog
#Text=, but Eris is uninhabited, small, and fucking slow.
#Text=Admittedly it hasn't been unbearable - Taehyung is an amiable partner when he's not being gross and in love with his long-distance boyfriend.
#Text=Dehydrated meals aren't as bad the fiftieth time around.
#Text=There's something of a gym on board.
#Text=Which is why Jeongguk has just finished construction on a full-size model of his own left arm made entirely of the toothpicks that come with his prepackaged lunches.
#Text=He sets a timer for five minutes; when it goes off he'll take the model apart piece by piece and rebuild it.
#Text=An unfamiliar beep startles Jeongguk out of his toothpick reverie.
#Text=It's a message, according to the green blinking light, but that's just unrealistic.
#Text=Eris is too far from any outpost to receive regular transmissions, so the ship's communication is conducted solely through the emergency system.
#Text=Jeongguk grabs a handle and pulls himself over to the flashing screen.
#Text=His partner floats through a hatch in the wall.
#Text=“Oh, Joonie says hi by the way.”
#Text=“You know you're not supposed to use the emergency channels to sweet-talk to your boyfriend, right?”
#Text=Next time I'll pull up Skype on the internet that we definitely have.”
#Text=Jeongguk rolls his eyes with a poorly concealed smile.
#Text=“What do they want from us now, another reading on atmospheric pressure?
#Text='Cause I can guarantee it'll be the same, just like the past-”
#Text=Jeongguk opens the transmission and the screen stops flashing to display a series of numbers.
#Text=“Who the fuck actually types in binary.
#Text=Jeongguk runs it through a converter, mentally preparing himself for some sort of warning or world-shattering revelation.
#Text=He stares at the text box on screen, and then at Taehyung.
#Text=Ever since 134340-Pluto and 136199-Eris were reclassified as planets, Min Yoongi’s life has been utter hell.
#Text=He only has three more months of Pluto Duty to slog through before he can get back home to his bed and real food and his baby, Min Holly, objectively the best dog ever.
#Text=Just three more months of his partner Seokjin's horrendous burger puns until he's free.
#Text=Which actually, now that he thinks about it, makes him just a little sad.
#Text=Yoongi lifts a rather mournful forkful of rehydrated peas to his mouth and wonders just how far apart his and Seokjin's home outposts are.
#Text=Seokjin floats over from where he was bent over a keyboard.
#Text=But the answer you were looking for is more along the lines of I tweaked our comm systems a bit and found out we’re close enough to our Eris equivalent to send a message.”
#Text=“Please don't tell me you sent them something already.”
#Text=Sometimes, like now, Yoongi has a hard time believing that Seokjin is his elder.
#Text=Other times the bastard spits out wisdom like a really hot fortune cookie.
#Text=“How much damage control am I looking at?”
#Text=“Eh, none really,” Seokjin replies with a shrug.
#Text=“Though I guess it depends on how they respond.”
#Text=Yoongi floats himself over to the comm screen, where a set of binary code stares back at him.
#Text=He skims it once, twice, and then his mouth falls open.
#Text=I mean, now that we've traced it back to the Eurydice and we know it wasn't horny aliens I don't see the point of replying.”
#Text=A moment of silence passes, broken only by the steady whirr of a distant fan.
#Text=Then the comm screen flashes again and Jeongguk lunges over to the keyboard.
#Text=“That's one way of ignoring it, I guess.”
#Text=>> of the Class C Spacecraft EURYDICE
#Text=>> extends a formal apology to the crew of the ORPHEUS
#Text=>> for his stupid idiot partner's inappropriate transmission
#Text=>> and requests that no disciplinary procedures be enacted.
#Text=I feel like I've heard that name.”
#Text=“There are probably a ton of Pilot Mins out there.”
#Text=“Yes well, only one of them has booty called us.
#Text=“I can't believe we've already run out of steak sachets.”
#Text=“I know, Orpheus is probably going to- wait, what?”
#Text=Seokjin waves an empty paper pouch in Yoongi's face.
#Text=The comm screen lights up before Seokjin can reply.
#Text=>> of the Class C Spacecraft ORPHEUS
#Text=>> assures the crew of the EURYDICE that no damage has been done
#Text=>> informs the crew of the EURYDICE that there was in fact lasting damage done to his brain cells
#Text=>> and requests compensation in the form of nskfnfks
#Text=“They seem like a fun crowd,” Seokjin says after a beat.
#Text=He should be at home listening to trashy music under a pile of blankets, not orbiting Pluto with only an extremely attractive chaos god to keep him company.

#Text=The only solace at this point is the fact that Pilot Jeon and Engineer Kim are guaranteed to be around his age since only young employees get sent out this far, and he won't have to live with the knowledge that his ship asked a senior citizen (or, god forbid, a superior officer) for nudes.
#Text=He glances at the clock in the corner of the screen.
#Text=Damn, in Standard Time it's already Christmas morning.
#Text=“Jin, do you know what day it is?”
#Text=Why else would I have given you your gift, silly.”
#Text=Seokjin shakes his head like it's Oh So Obvious, Yoongi You Fool.
#Text=All Seokjin has given him today is a headache.
#Text=“Yeah, the comm- I didn't tell you, did I.”

#Text=“The whole reason I was playing around with the comm was to see if I could contact Orpheus and have them join a video chat with us 'cause, you know, you mentioned how you didn't want to miss out on a traditional Christmas party while you're out here.
#Text=But then I kind of sent my test transmission by accident and now here we are.”
#Text=It isn't fair, how Seokjin is Adonis incarnate, a jack-of-all-trades,
#Text=A whole lot of arguing and awkward correspondence later, Yoongi watches the little phone icon on screen as he waits for the call to connect.
#Text=With each ring his resolve crumbles just a little more as his mind works overtime, rethinking everything that has happened in the past Standard Hour or so.

#Text=It only takes him about ten seconds to come to the conclusion that Pilot Jeon and Engineer Kim are undercover officers who humored his video call request just to snitch on him later, he's going to be reported and sent to Detention, Seokjin will forget about him, Hoseok will take custody of Holly, and Yoongi will never step foot in a spacecraft again.
#Text=Seokjin takes Yoongi's hand and gives it a squeeze.
#Text=It's just the first people we've seen in the past six months, no biggie.”

column4: Jeongguk and Taeyhung[41]|Seokjin and Min Yoongi[42]

column1: #Text=No need to hold hands then I guess.”
#Text=A grainy figure appears on the screen.
#Text=The figure disappears and a new one enters the frame.
#Text=This is Pilot Jeon of the Orpheus.”
#Text=“You're looking like a very healthy couple of pixels.”
#Text=“Engineer Kim, at your service,” Seokjin says with a flourish.
#Text=“And the mint-haired goblin next to me is Pilot Min.”
#Text=After a moment the picture becomes clear and two smiling faces come into view.
#Text=“Taehyung is also an Engineer Kim,” says Pilot Jeon.
#Text=Yoongi's first thought is that Jeongguk is
#Text=His wavy brown hair frames a soft face and sparkling doe eyes.

#Text=He fills out the sleeves of the standard issue uniform even better than Seokjin does, which creates a juxtaposition with his baby face that should be awkward but somehow just makes him even cuter.
#Text=Suddenly three more months of orbiting Pluto doesn't sound so bad with the Orpheus as their neighbor.
#Text=He also feels better than he has in months.
#Text=He's never really bought into the whole commercialised holiday thing - too cheesy and capitalist.

#Text=As such he doesn't have any idea what constitutes a perfect Christmas, but if he were to guess, floating by the comm screen and talking to the two-man crew of the Eurydice would come pretty close.
#Text=Jeongguk appreciates pretty people, usually from a purely aesthetic standpoint - an attractive face is just nice to look at.
#Text=Seokjin and Yoongi both have very attractive faces (and so does Taehyung actually, but his status as Best Bro cancels it out).
#Text=Honestly, Seokjin's face is kind of terrifying: he's too perfect to be real, but his personality is so goddamn genuine that it's almost off-putting.
#Text=Yoongi, on the other hand, has Jeongguk's stomach doing cartwheels and his heart crooning like Sinatra.
#Text=Jeongguk watches Yoongi explain something to Taehyung, smiling at the way the other pilot talks with a small pout and uses his hands to draw invisible diagrams in the air in front of him.
#Text=At one point he has to resist the urge to give the screen a gentle tap right where Yoongi's nose is, because that would be weird.
#Text=But damn is that an adorable nose.
#Text=Pluto to Pilot Jeon, come in Pilot Jeon,” Seokjin says, waving a hand.
#Text=Just off to do a routine check.
#Text=Seokjin floats out of frame with a wink and fingerguns.
#Text=Jeongguk waves and Taehyung shouts out a goodbye before slamming a hand on Jeongguk's shoulder.
#Text=“This Engineer Kim has to go, too,” he announces.
#Text=“I think I'll stay here for a bit.”
#Text=Taehyung makes a grand exit from the room, waving all the way.
#Text=Should it bother him that he's already so enamored by a near stranger?
#Text=“So… he seems like a fun guy.”
#Text=Yoongi scratches his cheek, an air of awkwardness settling now that Seokjin and Taehyung aren't there to act as more outgoing buffers.
#Text=“What kind of music do you listen to?”
#Text=Yoongi can never listen to music ever again: it'll only end in disappointment.
#Text=Nothing, not a single song, will ever match up to Jeongguk's voice when he sings.
#Text=Yoongi needs to make a record label right this instant and sign Jeongguk on because
#Text=Jeongguk's cheeks flush pink up to his ears.
#Text=There's a tear in my left eye right at this very moment.”
#Text=God, what Yoongi would do to hear Jeongguk's laugh in person.
#Text=They talk for what could be minutes, or hours, or days about everything and nothing.
#Text=(“Do you think the alien skeleton they dug up on Ganymede is legit?”
#Text=“Did the government-operated division dig it up?”
#Text=“Why do I feel like there's a wrong answer to this.”)
#Text=And when their eyelids begin to droop and it's hard to talk through all the yawning, they disconnect the video call and keep chatting through text.
#Text=It's well into the evening by Standard Time, and well past bedtime by Yoongi's circadian rhythm, when they finally say their goodbyes.
#Text=>> i rlly need to sleep but
#Text=>> maybe i'll buy u a gift when we're off dwarf planet duty
#Text=>> was this a good christmas for u?
#Text=Ever since the Eurydice and Orpheus made contact, Jeon Jeongguk's life has been utter hell.
#Text=He now spends most of his free time glued to the comm screen either agonizing over How To Flirt With A Cute Boy or crying about the latest Yoongi Selfie he's been privileged enough to receive.
#Text=He picked up his watercolors again just to see if he could capture Yoongi's boopable nose on paper.
#Text=He even filled a notepad with original song lyrics and sent it out the airlock after realizing the magnitude of what he had done.
#Text=Pilot Min of the Class C Spacecraft Eurydice has officially ruined Jeongguk's life, and honestly he couldn't be happier.
